backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining the portfolio backend with user profiles, artworks CRUD, blob storage for logo/cover/portrait images, text content, and media contacts, all gated by role-based access control (admin/user permissions).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—admin authentication flow fix and font color contrast fixes—to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, styling approach, and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio' that mounts the app at the root div and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (portfolio, admin-login, admin), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider with 5-minute stale time, ThemeProvider, and a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying the artist portrait, name, bio (fetched via React Query), and a static stats grid with high-contrast charcoal/terracotta text on white/cream backgrounds.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkGallery.t: Gallery grid component that fetches all artworks, renders them in a responsive grid with hover overlays, and opens a lightbox dialog with full artwork details on click.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders the Contact section with WhatsApp, Instagram, location, phone, and email cards, fetching contact details dynamically via the `useMediaContacts` hook and showing skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProjects: Displays a static list of five featured art projects by rendering a `ProjectSection` component for each, with alternating image/text layouts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, social links (WhatsApp/Instagram), quick navigation links, and a hidden admin-login easter egg triggered by five rapid logo taps.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section that displays the artist's name, tagline, stats, and a WhatsApp CTA button over a dynamic cover image, with skeleton loading states for all fetched content.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, active section highlighting, smooth-scroll links, a WhatsApp CTA, mobile menu, and a hidden admin-login easter egg on five logo taps.
frontend/src/components/ProjectSection.t: Reusable component that renders a single project card with an image and a text panel (number badge, location, title, description), supporting an optional reversed layout.
frontend/src/components/QRSection.tsx: Displays an Instagram follow section with a static QR code image and a dynamic follow button linking to the Instagram profile fetched via `useMediaContacts`.
Renders a 6-card grid section listing artist services (murals, interior decoration, commercial spaces, etc.) with icons, numbered watermarks, and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Renders a 6-card grid section highlighting trust/differentiator points (quality, passion, timeliness, etc.) with icons, accent bars, and hover effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, admin checks, artworks (CRUD), and logo management.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollSpy.ts: Custom hook that tracks which section ID is currently in view based on scroll position, returning the active section ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining a warm artisanal OKLCH color palette with CSS variables for both light and dark modes, plus custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, checks if the caller has admin privileges using the backend actor, and redirects to the admin panel or shows an error accordingly.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Full admin panel page with tabs for managing artworks (upload, edit, delete), site images (logo, cover, portrait), text content, and media contacts, guarded by an admin auth check on mount.
frontend/src/pages/PortfolioPage.tsx: Public-facing portfolio page that composes all section components (Hero, About, Services, Gallery, Contact, etc.) into a single scrollable layout.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the project's custom brand palette (terracotta, gold, cream, charcoal), typography fonts, border radii, and shadcn/ui CSS-variable-based semantic color tokens.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the current version, known issues (admin auth failures, text contrast problems), existing feature fix requests, and a pending backend admin permission resolution task.
